scripts.gen:types: cd ../.. && pnpm exec supabase gen types typescript --linked --schema public > packages/db/types/database.ts.tmp && tail -n +2 packages/db/types/database.ts.tmp > packages/db/types/database.ts && rm packages/db/types/database.ts.tmp
scripts.push: cd ../.. && pnpm exec supabase db push
scripts.push:dry: cd ../.. && pnpm exec supabase db push --dry-run
